fact: SoloGK positions its gloves as professional equipment that becomes an extension of a goalkeeper's skills.
evidence_excerpt: Our Goalkeeper Gloves are more than just equipment they are extension of your skills

fact: SoloGK describes itself as a UK-based brand focused on making professional-grade equipment accessible without very high prices.
evidence_excerpt: UK-based brand ... price and quality are at the forefront of our mission

fact: The storefront organizes products into Eclipse, Lunar, Vortex, Cobra, and Viper collections.
evidence_excerpt: Shop by collection: Eclipse, Lunar, Vortex, Cobra, Viper

fact: Visible featured-product prices range from GBP 25 for Cobra Junior to GBP 40 for Lunar 2.
SoloGK emphasizes professional-grade Contact latex and superior dry- and wet-weather grip.
evidence_excerpt: professional-grade Contact latex that offers superior grip in both dry and wet conditions

fact: Lunar 2 is described as developed with professional keepers and elite coaches.
evidence_excerpt: direct collaboration between professional keepers and elite coaches

fact: Lunar 2 uses 4mm German Contact Latex and prioritizes grip and stopping power.
SoloGK explicitly describes a performance-versus-durability tradeoff for Lunar 2.
evidence_excerpt: You are choosing elite performance over long-term ruggedness

fact: SoloGK offers buying guidance to customers who are new to goalkeeper glove cuts, latex options, and styles.
evidence_excerpt: NEW TO GOALKEEPING? CONFUSED BY THE DIFFERENT TYPES OF GLOVES?

fact: The public storefront catalog lists about 20 product items, allowing product listings to be separated from collection/category links.
evidence_excerpt: Public Shopify product catalog entries with product handles under /products/.
